creator: sudakov@sibptus.tomsk.ru
text:
Kerberos in the base system is too old (0.6.3) and has bugs
which have been fixed in more recent versions of Heimdal.

Fix: 

This bug was fixed in releases after Jun 12 2007. Heimdal 1.1 for sure.
The recent Heimdal should be imported into the base system.
How-To-Repeat: Try to obtain a tgt from a Microsoft domain controller and you will get:
kinit: krb5_get_init_creds: Response too big for UDP, retry with TCP
